# UC-13.1.57 · Prometheus Remote Write Samples Dropped or Send Errors

## Description

Dropped samples create blind spots in long-term metrics stores.

## Value

Ensures remote write paths stay healthy for compliance and SLO evidence.

## Implementation

Map `url` label to tenant; alert before queue persistence fills disk.

## SPL

```spl
| mstats sum(_value) AS dropped WHERE index=prometheus metric_name="prometheus_remote_storage_samples_dropped_total" span=15m BY remote_name
| where dropped > 0
| sort - dropped
```

## Visualization

Line chart (dropped rate), Table (remote endpoint).

## References

- [Prometheus documentation — monitoring Prometheus](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/troubleshooting/)
- [Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/observability/en/gdi/opentelemetry/opentelemetry.html)
